name: Spinach and Sausage Phyllo Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Bulk pork or Italian sausage
1/2 cup Sliced roasted red bell peppers (from 7.25 oz jar)
9 oz Frozen spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. In a large skillet over medium heat, brown the sausage; drain. Cool slightly. Stir in roasted bell peppers, olives, mozzarella cheese, and eggs; mix well.
2. In a medium bowl, combine Cheddar cheese, ricotta cheese, and spinach; mix well.
3. Unroll the phyllo pastry; cover with plastic wrap or towel. Place 1 sheet of phyllo in an ungreased 13x9-inch (3-quart) baking dish, folding to fit. Brush lightly with melted butter. Continue layering and brushing with butter using 3 additional sheets of phyllo.
4. Spoon half of the sausage mixture over the phyllo. Layer and brush with butter 4 more sheets of phyllo. Top with spinach mixture. Layer and brush with butter 4 more sheets of phyllo. Top with remaining sausage mixture. Layer and brush with butter 4 more sheets of phyllo.
5. Score the top of the phyllo in diamond shapes. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 to 60 minutes or until puffed and golden brown. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
